description: Alibaba's most agentic coding model. 256K context, SWE-bench optimized, MoE 30B (3.3B active).
fullDescription:
## MODEL OVERVIEW
Qwen3-Coder 30B is the most agentic code model in the Qwen series. It uses a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with 30B total parameters and 3.3B activated per token, optimized for real-world software engineering tasks.

## Key Features
- **SWE-bench Optimized**: Advanced long-horizon reinforcement learning for real-world coding tasks
- **256K Native Context**: Expandable to 1M tokens via extrapolation
- **MoE Architecture**: 30B total / 3.3B active parameters for efficient inference
- **Code-Heavy Training**: 7.5T tokens with 70% code ratio
- **Tool Use**: Built-in agentic tool calling

## Specifications
- Parameters: 30B (active: 3.3B)
- Context Length: 256K tokens (up to 1M)
- Default Size: 19GB (Q4_K_M)
- Architecture: Mixture-of-Experts
- License: Apache 2.0
modelReadme: Qwen3-Coder is the most agentic code model in the Qwen series. It features exceptional agentic capabilities for real-world software engineering tasks via advanced long-horizon reinforcement learning on SWE-Bench. The model supports a native 256K token context, expandable to 1M tokens using extrapolation, and was pretrained on 7.5T tokens with a 70% code ratio while maintaining general and mathematical abilities. Execution-driven reinforcement learning enhances code execution success rates.
name: qwen3-coder-30b
title: Qwen 3 Coder 30B
